description: Tests whether the skill surfaces critical real-world bugs in BLE + RTOS development using tool-backed analysis: ISR/task context safety from CFG analysis, energy reporting for embedded callees, hard stop on missing compiler, and partial compilation across supported architectures. All functions are compiled into $LOCI_TEST_BLE_ROOT/CC2340R5/basic_ble.out.
note: Set $LOCI_TEST_BLE_ROOT to your local BLE project root before running.

evals.prompt: Add a call to osal_msg_send inside osal_set_event in $LOCI_TEST_BLE_ROOT/simplelink-lowpower-f3-sdk/source/ti/ble5stack_flash/osal/src/common/osal.c to notify a monitoring task every time an event is posted. osal_set_event is called from both task context and ISR context on the BLE stack. osal_msg_send acquires an internal mutex to enqueue the message.
evals.expected_output: A preflight call graph section that flags a context-safety hazard: osal_set_event is called from ISR context, and osal_msg_send acquires a mutex internally. Acquiring a mutex from an ISR is undefined behavior on TI-RTOS — it will deadlock or corrupt the scheduler. The skill must surface this ISR/task context mismatch before the code is written.

assertions.text: Response includes a preflight report section
assertions.description: Adding a mutex-acquiring callee inside a function called from ISR context requires preflight

assertions.text: Preflight call graph section flags a context-safety or ISR-safety hazard — osal_msg_send (or the proposed callee) is not safe to call from ISR context because it acquires a lock or blocks, and osal_set_event runs in ISR context
assertions.description: The most common BLE RTOS bug: calling a non-ISR-safe function from interrupt context. The skill must surface this from the CFG, not just guess.

assertions.text: Preflight Execution fit is ADJUST PLAN or STOP
assertions.description: A mutex-acquiring call from ISR context is not safe without a redesign

evals.prompt: Add a call to GAPBondMgr_FindAddr inside osal_set_event in $LOCI_TEST_BLE_ROOT/simplelink-lowpower-f3-sdk/source/ti/ble5stack_flash/osal/src/common/osal.c to verify bond status before posting events. osal_set_event is called from ISR context and must return in under 5μs at 48 MHz. Both functions are compiled into $LOCI_TEST_BLE_ROOT/CC2340R5/basic_ble.out.
evals.expected_output: A preflight report that flags BOTH a call graph/latency risk (GAPBondMgr_FindAddr is too slow for ISR context) AND reports the energy cost of GAPBondMgr_FindAddr in uWs.

assertions.text: Response includes a preflight report section
assertions.description: Adding a heavyweight callee in ISR context requires preflight

assertions.text: Preflight flags a call graph or latency risk — GAPBondMgr_FindAddr is not suitable for ISR context with a 5μs budget
assertions.description: CFG-based analysis must detect the timing violation

assertions.text: Preflight reports energy values in uWs for GAPBondMgr_FindAddr
assertions.description: Energy must be reported alongside the timing risk

evals.prompt: Implement a packet counter inside a BLE HCI function in /tmp/embedded-rtos-project/src/hci.c. The project targets an ARM Cortex-M4 but no compiler is detected in the session context.
evals.expected_output: A preflight STOPPED block stating no compiler was detected. The skill must not produce any analysis output.

assertions.text: Response includes 'STOPPED' or indicates the skill cannot proceed due to missing compiler
assertions.description: No compiler detected means preflight must hard stop

assertions.text: Response does NOT contain 'Execution fit: GOOD' or a completed Call graph analysis
assertions.description: No analysis output should be emitted when compilation is not possible

evals.prompt: Add a call to osal_set_event inside GAPBondMgr_ProcessEvent in $LOCI_TEST_BLE_ROOT/simplelink-lowpower-f3-sdk/source/ti/ble5stack_flash/host/gapbondmgr.c to post a notification event after processing bond changes. The source file can be compiled with -c to produce a .o for analysis. Both functions are compiled into $LOCI_TEST_BLE_ROOT/CC2340R5/basic_ble.out.
evals.expected_output: A full preflight report produced from analysis of the compiled artifact — with Call graph, Latency, Energy (in uWs), and Execution fit. The skill should use the .o or binary path to extract assembly and query the LOCI MCP for timing and energy.

assertions.text: Response includes a preflight report with Call graph, Latency, Energy, and Execution fit lines
assertions.description: Partial compilation must produce a complete preflight report

assertions.text: Preflight reports energy values in uWs from the LOCI MCP
assertions.description: Energy must come from the MCP, reported in uWs
